title: Squirrel Removal in Tarrytown, NY | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Tarrytown, Westchester. Safe, humane extraction and exclusion. Serving historic homes and estates. Call for fast response!
intro: Squirrels are common in Tarrytown's tree-lined neighborhoods, but when they invade your attic or chimney, they can cause serious damage to insulation, wiring, and structural components. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Tarrytown and Westchester County, combining humane trapping with permanent exclusion solutions. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges of protecting Tarrytown's historic homes and modern residences from persistent squirrel intrusions.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Tarrytown homeowners for years with proven squirrel removal expertise tailored to Westchester properties. Our team uses humane, effective methods and provides warranties on exclusion work, ensuring squirrels won't return to your attic, eaves, or crawl spaces.
localContext: Tarrytown's proximity to the Hudson River, abundant mature trees along Broadway and surrounding estates, and historic architecture create ideal conditions for squirrel populations to thrive and seek shelter in homes. From the historic homes near Sleepy Hollow Country Club to properties along the Pocantico River, we've helped countless Tarrytown residents reclaim their attics and prevent costly damage.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Tarrytown?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Tarrytown typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. Larger historic homes or properties with multiple access points may require more comprehensive sealing and repair work, affecting the final cost.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Tarrytown attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in the morning and evening, visible entry holes near rooflines or soffits, chewed wood or wires, droppings in the attic, and seeing squirrels entering or exiting your roof. Tarrytown's older homes with wooden soffits and architectural details are particularly vulnerable to squirrel entry.

faqs.question: Is squirrel removal in Tarrytown humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses humane live trapping methods that safely capture and relocate squirrels according to New York State regulations. We never use poisons or lethal methods, and we ensure babies are reunited with mothers when present. After removal, we seal all entry points to prevent future infestations.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to squirrel problems in Tarrytown?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Tarrytown squirrel removal requests. Given the damage squirrels can cause to wiring and insulation, we prioritize rapid response to prevent further harm to your property. Our team is familiar with Tarrytown neighborhoods and can quickly reach your location in Westchester County.
